heading: From Start To Finish
subheading: Comprehensive surveying services for every phase of your project.

categories.name: Surveying & Mapping
categories.pageSubheading: Precision surveying and mapping solutions for infrastructure, land development, and construction.
categories.pageImageAlt: Surveying and mapping team working in the field

services.name: Geodetic & Control Surveying
bullets: Establishes precise horizontal and vertical control across the project site.
Supports consistent positioning for mapping, design, and construction work.
Uses GNSS and conventional survey methods to maintain project-wide accuracy.

services.name: Right-of-Way Surveys and Mapping
bullets: Defines corridor limits, easements, and parcel boundaries.
Supports roadway and infrastructure planning with mapped ownership impacts.
Provides documentation for acquisition, design, and permitting needs.

services.name: Topographic / As-built / 3D (DTM) Surveys
bullets: Captures terrain, utilities, and visible site features in detail.
Documents existing conditions and completed work for design validation.
Generates 3D surface models to support engineering and planning.

services.name: Bridge Surveys
bullets: Measures bridge geometry, elevations, and surrounding conditions.
Supports rehabilitation, expansion, and replacement design efforts.
Provides accurate field data for structural and roadway coordination.

categories.name: Subsurface Utility Engineering (SUE)
categories.pageSubheading: Reliable subsurface utility engineering services that reduce risk and improve design confidence.
categories.pageImageAlt: Subsurface utility engineering crew locating underground utilities

services.name: Quality Level A (QLA) - Utility Locates
bullets: Confirms utility location through direct exposure at specific points.
Verifies depth, size, and material where exact data is required.
Helps reduce design risk in critical conflict areas.

services.name: Quality Level B (QLB) – Utility Designates
bullets: Uses surface geophysics to designate existing underground utilities.
Maps horizontal utility positions without full exposure.
Supports design decisions in accordance with ASCE 38 practices.

services.name: Quality Level C (QLC)  – Correlated Records to Surveyed Features
bullets: Correlates utility records with visible site features.
Improves the usefulness of existing owner data through field survey.
Provides a practical planning-level view of underground conditions.

services.name: Quality Level D (QLD) – Existing Records
bullets: Compiles utility information from existing records and verbal sources.
Provides an early understanding of potential underground infrastructure.
Best suited for preliminary planning before higher-confidence investigation.

categories.name: Utility Coordination (UC)
categories.pageSubheading: Utility coordination services that keep stakeholders aligned and projects moving forward.
categories.pageImageAlt: Utility coordination field work and infrastructure review

services.name: Utility Identification and Coordination
bullets: Identifies existing utility owners, systems, and likely conflict points.
Documents how proposed improvements interact with current infrastructure.
Keeps project teams informed as utility issues are discovered.

services.name: Management of Relocations and Adjustments
bullets: Coordinates relocation planning with utility owners and stakeholders.
Tracks required adjustments to reduce schedule and construction impacts.
Helps align utility work with the broader project timeline.

services.name: Permit Coordination Services
bullets: Manages permit-related communication between project teams and providers.
Helps collect utility requirements, submittals, and review responses.
Reduces delays by keeping approval workflows organized.

services.name: Regulatory Compliance (Federal, State, and Local)
bullets: Supports compliance with utility, transportation, and local agency requirements.
Assists with agreements, approvals, and required coordination documents.
Helps projects move forward with fewer regulatory surprises.

categories.name: 3D Laser Scanning (LiDAR)
categories.pageSubheading: Advanced LiDAR and scanning solutions for accurate site documentation, modeling, and analysis.
categories.pageImageAlt: LiDAR scanning equipment capturing site conditions

services.name: Static LiDar (Topo/DTM)
bullets: Captures dense, high-accuracy scan data from fixed ground positions.
Works well for topography, structures, and detailed site documentation.
Produces reliable geometry for modeling and analysis.

services.name: Mobile LiDAR (Topo/DTM)
bullets: Collects LiDAR data from vehicle-mounted systems along active corridors.
Efficiently documents roads, utilities, and surrounding infrastructure.
Reduces field time while capturing large linear assets.

services.name: Point Cloud Modeling (TopoDOT)
bullets: Transforms raw point clouds into usable mapped features and models.
Extracts curb lines, pavement, utilities, and structural detail.
Supports design teams with clean deliverables from complex scan data.

services.name: Aerial-Drones
bullets: Uses drones to capture aerial imagery and site-wide elevation data.
Supports terrain modeling, progress tracking, and visual documentation.
Provides efficient coverage for large or hard-to-access areas.

categories.name: Construction
categories.pageSubheading: Construction surveying services that support layout, verification, and project control in the field.
categories.pageImageAlt: Construction surveying team on an active project site

services.name: Construction Layout & Staking
bullets: Places field control points for grading, utilities, and structural work.
Translates design plans into accurate on-site construction layout.
Helps crews build to the intended line and grade.

services.name: As-Built Surveys
bullets: Documents completed construction in its installed location.
Compares built conditions against design intent and project records.
Supports closeout, verification, and future maintenance needs.

services.name: Settlement Monitoring
bullets: Monitors movement over time in soil, structures, or infrastructure.
Identifies settlement trends early so teams can respond quickly.
Supports risk management during and after construction.

services.name: Earthwork Calculations
bullets: Calculates cut, fill, and material quantities from survey data.
Tracks earthwork progress throughout the life of the project.
Helps improve budgeting, haul planning, and production control.

categories.name: Residential/Commercial
categories.pageSubheading: Survey solutions for residential and commercial properties, permitting, and property due diligence.
categories.pageImageAlt: Residential and commercial surveying at a developed property

services.name: Boundary Survey and Elevation (FEMA) Certificate
bullets: Locates property lines and key site improvements with precision.
Provides elevation information needed for FEMA-related documentation.
Helps owners, lenders, and insurers understand site conditions.

services.name: Platting Survey
bullets: Creates or retraces lot layouts for subdivision and land development.
Defines parcel dimensions, corners, and related rights-of-way.
Supports entitlement, recordation, and future property transfer.

services.name: ALTA/NSPS Land Title Survey
bullets: Meets ALTA/NSPS standards for commercial property transactions.
Documents boundary evidence, improvements, easements, and access.
Supports title review, financing, and due diligence.

services.name: FDEP / Mean High Water Survey
bullets: Determines shoreline or jurisdictional water-related survey limits.
Supports permitting and environmental coordination requirements.
Provides defensible data for coastal and waterfront projects.
